summary: Iteration 6 testing complete - Backend refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular route files (auth.py, blog.py, testimonials.py, contact.py, uploads.py) verified working. All 21 backend API tests passed. SEO files (sitemap.xml, robots.txt) accessible and valid. Frontend verified: 5 service cards, 5 services dropdown items including Yoga du Rire, contact form with 6 service checkboxes, all 5 service pages accessible, admin dashboard with 3 tabs (blogs, testimonials, messages).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring well-structured: routes/__init__.py properly shares db connection across all route modules
Route prefix chain correct: server.py api_router (/api) + module routers (/auth, /blog, etc.) = final paths like /api/auth/login
CORS configured with allow_origins=['*'] - consider restricting to specific origins in production
seed_data_creation: Test contact request created during backend tests (TEST_Iter6 prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 verified backend refactoring: 1) server.py is now thin orchestrator importing route modules, 2) routes/__init__.py exports shared db connection, 3) All API endpoints work identically: /api/auth/login, /api/auth/me, /api/auth/logout, /api/blog/posts, /api/testimonials, /api/contact, /api/uploads, 4) SEO files at /sitemap.xml and /robots.txt, 5) Admin dashboard at /admin/login -> /admin/dashboard with 3 tabs, 6) Contact form has 6 service checkboxes including yoga-du-rire

auth_routes.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Returns user data and sets httpOnly cookies
auth_routes.GET /api/auth/me: PASS - Returns current user with valid cookie

contact_routes.POST /api/contact: PASS - Accepts contact form with interestedServices
contact_routes.GET /api/contact/requests: PASS - Admin can view contact messages

uploads_routes.POST /api/uploads: PASS - Requires auth, admin can upload

seo_files.GET /sitemap.xml: PASS - Valid XML with all service URLs
seo_files.GET /robots.txt: PASS - Contains sitemap reference and disallow rules

frontend.admin_dashboard_tabs: PASS - Articles de blog, Témoignages, Messages (24)
